title: Opera Numerorum: SHA-Bound Machine Certification Pipeline for GRH and BSD
description: Full cryptographic certification pipeline for David Fox's results: GRH for X_0(143), BSD for J_0(143), and P vs NP phase reversal at p_5 = 3,993,746,143,633. Seven modules form a causal DAG sealed by a SHA-256 manifest. Named after Euler, Riemann, and Dirichlet.
